description: Clinical override rules for Ultra V3 hybrid decision layer. Semantic separation: antibiotic_misuse_risk reflects stewardship appropriateness; recommended_next_step reflects clinical workflow action. urgent_doctor_review is reserved for clinical urgency (instability_override) only -- high misuse risk alone maps to stewardship_review_required.

action_semantics.stewardship_review_required: High antibiotic misuse risk -- clinician review required before any antibiotic prescription. Not a clinical emergency.
action_semantics.review_recommended: Moderate risk or mixed signals -- watchful waiting and antibiotic review recommended.
action_semantics.monitor_and_observe: Low misuse risk -- standard ED protocol, no immediate antibiotic concern.
action_semantics.urgent_doctor_review: CLINICAL URGENCY ONLY (instability_override): severe diagnosis + hemodynamic compromise. Immediate physician evaluation required.
action_semantics.doctor_review_recommended: Model confidence low or uncertain -- human review required regardless of risk class.

instability_override.description: Clinical urgency escalation: ESI acuity <= 2 AND (low_spo2 OR tachycardia) AND severe diagnosis flag. Forces possible_clinical_pattern='urgent_review' and recommended_next_step='urgent_doctor_review'. Does NOT override antibiotic_misuse_risk -- clinical severity is a separate concern from antibiotic stewardship appropriateness.

multi_alarm_escalation.description: Escalate 'low' -> 'medium': high fever AND tachycardia AND tachypnea all present simultaneously.

viral_no_abx_flag.description: Flag as 'viral_no_abx' when: no antibiotic given, viral diagnosis, and at least 3 viral-signal features are present. Does not change class or action -- this is a stewardship annotation only.

low_confidence_escalation.description: When model confidence is low or model is uncertain (top2_gap < 0.15), override recommended action to 'doctor_review_recommended'. Risk class is NOT changed.
